profile
the main thing i remember about my childhood is that my desire to research and learn is as alive
as it is today. i have been especially interested in getting to know different cultures and learning
different languages and literature since my childhood. i chose language as my main field during
high school. afterward, i majored in american culture and literature at ankara university and
progressed in the fields of language and literature. in my third year of university, i started
studying arabic at tömer, a language institution affiliated with ankara university and
graduated with a b2 diploma. at the same time, i had the opportunity to study different
languages by taking two years of french in high school and two years of german at university. i
have been working as an english teacher for the last two years, although not regularly. during
this process, i experienced the pride and pleasure of being able to teach english to many
children. in the meantime, i want to become more academically competent and work as an
academic one day, in connection with the experiences i have gained and my interests. i can
describe myself as determined and curious. i pursue my interests and goals until i achieve
success in the fields, i am interested in. because of my curiosity, my interests do not decrease, on
the contrary, they increase day by day. that's why i always focus on development, knowledge,
and experience.
